title: UK Companies House API
excerpt:
Hi 
Has anyone tried to integrate the UK Companies House API into a Monday board so that the correct companies details such as Registration Number and Address can populate fields to ensure consistency? 
Regards 
Dennis

posts.author: SirScannell (Dennis Scannell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Has anyone tried to integrate the UK Companies House API into a Monday board so that the correct companies details such as Registration Number and Address can populate fields to ensure consistency?

Regards
Dennis

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SirScannell

Just wanted to chime in here – while I’m unaware of any monday.com users that have used that specific API, I was able to locate what I believe to be their API documentation here - https://developer.companieshouse.gov.uk/api/docs/

While I’m not familiar enough with this API to be confident it allows you to access Registration Numbers and Addresses, I thought it might be helpful

If you have any questions in regards to bringing this data into monday.com, just let us know and we’re happy to see how we might be of assistance!

-Scott
